zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Jordan於1572年4月24日出生在英國素福爾可布盧迪申時，她的父親Henry Jordan38歲，母親Margaret Woolnough40歲。她於1607年與Richard Gyle II在英國素福爾可維爾比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1629年1月24日在英國英格蘭素福爾可易爾可沙拉爾 聖 瑪格麗特享年56歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可易爾可沙拉爾 聖 瑪格麗特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Jordan于1572年4月24日出生在英国素福爾可布盧迪申时，她的父亲Henry Jordan38岁，母亲Margaret Woolnough40岁。她于1607年与Richard Gyle II在英国素福爾可維爾比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1629年1月24日在英国英格兰素福爾可易爾可沙拉爾 聖 瑪格麗特享年56岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可易爾可沙拉爾 聖 瑪格麗特。

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, French (mainly Alsace and Haute-Savoie), Polish, Czech, and Slovenian; Spanish and Hungarian (Jordán): from the Christian personal name or nickname Jordan. This is taken from the name of the river Jordan (Hebrew Yarden, a derivative of yarad ‘to go down’, i.e. to the Dead Sea). At the time of the Crusades it was a common practice for crusaders and pilgrims to bring back flasks of water from the river in which John the Baptist had baptized people, including Christ himself, and to use it in the christening of their own children. As a result Jordan became quite a common personal name.

variants.name: Giordano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Rocco, Antonio, Pasquale, Carmine, Vito, Domenic, Gaetano, Giuseppe, Sal, Santo.
Italian: from the personal name Giordano, an equivalent of Jordan .

variants.name: Jourdan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Dominique, Gabrielle, Henri, Lucien, Pierre, Raoul, Yves.
English: variant of   Jordan  .
French (mainly southern): variant of   Jourdain  , a cognate of 2 below.

variants.name: Jourdain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Henri, Pierre, Fritz, Hans, Jacques, Rommel.
French, Breton (mainly Finistère), and West Indian (mainly Haiti, also Martinique and Dominican Republic): from the French personal name Jourdain, an equivalent of Jordan .
English (London, Derbyshire): French-influenced variant of   Jordan  ; compare 1 above.

variants.name: Jordison
meanings: English (North Yorkshire, Durham, and Northumberland): from a Middle English pet form, Jordi, of the male personal name Jordan + -son, or directly from a phonetic shortening of Jordanson.

variants.name: Jorden
meanings: English: variant of   Jordan  .
North German (mainly Jörden): probably a variant of Jordan . Compare Yerden and Yerdon .

variants.name: Judd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Judde, Jutte, a pet form of Jordan .
German: variant of   Jude  .

variants.name: Jorda
meanings: Catalan (Jordà): from the personal name Jordà (see Jordan ).

variants.name: Jerden
meanings: English: from a variant of the personal name Jurdon, an old form of Jordan .

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

variants.name: Jordon
meanings: English: variant of   Jordan  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Jordan was born on 24 April 1572, in Brundish, Suffolk, England, her father, Henry Jordan, was 38 and her mother, Margaret Woolnough, was 40. She married Richard Gyle II in 1607, in Wilby, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 24 January 1629, in Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Jordan est née le 24 avril 1572, à Brundish, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Henry Jordan, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret Woolnough, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Gyle II en 1607, à Wilby, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 24 janvier 1629, à Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Jordan am 24. April 1572 in Brundish, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Jordan 38 und ihre Mutter Margaret Woolnough 40. Sie hat 1607 in Wilby, Suffolk, England Richard Gyle II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 24. Januar 1629 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Jordan è nata il il 24 aprile 1572 nel Brundish, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Henry Jordan, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Margaret Woolnough, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Richard Gyle II nel 1607, nel Wilby, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 24 gennaio 1629, nel Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Jordanが1572年4月24日にイギリススフォルクブルンディッシュで生まれた時，父Henry Jordanは38歳，母Margaret Woolnoughは40歳であった。1607年にイギリススフォルクウィルビーでRichard Gyle IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1629年1月24日にイギリスイギリススフォルクイルケトシャル スト マーガレットで56歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクイルケトシャル スト マーガレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Jordan(이)가 1572년 4월 24일 영국 수폴크 브런디시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Jordan(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Woolnough(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1607년 영국 수폴크 윌비에서 Richard Gyle II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1629년 1월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이케츠홀 스트 마거릿에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 이케츠홀 스트 마거릿에 묻혔다.

pt.Aston Juxta Birmingham,Warwick,England: Aston juxta Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Jordan nasceu em 24 de abril de 1572, em Brundish, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Jordan, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Woolnough, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Gyle II em 1607, em Wilby, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 24 de janeiro de 1629, em Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England: илкецхолл ст маргарет, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
илкецхолл ст маргарет, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Ilketshall St. Margaret, Suffolk, Englan: илкецхолл ст маргарет, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Aston Juxta Birmingham,Warwick,England: астон джукста бирмингхам, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Jordan родилась 24 апреля 1572 г. в местности брундиш, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Jordan было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Woolnough, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Gyle II в 1607 г. в местности уилби, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 24 января 1629 г. в местности илкецхолл ст маргарет, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности илкецхолл ст маргарет, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Jordan nació el 24 de abril de 1572, en Brundish, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Jordan, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margaret Woolnough, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Richard Gyle II en 1607, en Wilby, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 24 de enero de 1629, en Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
